title: Vex Origin
description: Here's my custom Vex Origin for the Origins mod
body:
## THE VEX ORIGIN INCLUDES:
- A launch ability (to use just press the "primary active" keybind from the origins mod)
- An elytra with custom texture
- No fall damage
- Particles that show when it is night or you are under blocks
- You are a quarter of the size of a normal player
- Slightly slower
- Slightly "see-through" as Vex's are technically ghosts

# 
**MUST USE ORIGINS FORGE OR FABRIC WITH PEHKUI.**
